keyLearnings: Two-layer fix: infrastructure timeout mechanism (timeoutMs in BackgroundTaskManager) + workflow policy (skill docs with explicit timeout values and skip instructions)
Quality gates must be optional — subagent steps are quality improvements, not hard prerequisites; always provide a skip path
Timer type portability: use ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> and globalThis.clearTimeout for Bun/Node/browser compatibility
Idempotency is critical for async timeout callbacks — finalize() must guard against already-terminal tasks
